# auth_tokens corpus. Synthetic invalid placeholders only.

# === HTTP Basic Authorization Header ===
# expect: HTTP Basic Authorization Header
Authorization: Basic dXNlcm5hbWU6c3VwZXJzZWNyZXRwYXNzd29yZA==

# === HTTP Token Authorization Header ===
# expect: HTTP Token Authorization Header
Authorization: Token abcdef0123456789abcdef0123456789ABCDEF

# === curl Basic Auth Flag ===
# expect: curl Basic Auth Flag
curl -s https://api.example.com -u admin:notARealPassword

# === OAuth2 client_secret Parameter ===
# expect: OAuth2 client_secret Parameter
client_secret=notARealClientSecretValue1234567890abcdef

# === OAuth2 refresh_token Parameter ===
# expect: OAuth2 refresh_token Parameter
refresh_token=notARealRefreshToken_0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === OAuth2 access_token Parameter ===
# expect: OAuth2 access_token Parameter
https://app.example.com/cb#access_token=notARealAccessToken0123456789abcdef

# === OAuth2 client_assertion Parameter ===
# expect: OAuth2 client_assertion Parameter
client_assertion=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiJ9.notARealAssertionBody0123456789

# === OAuth2 grant_type password ===
# expect: OAuth2 grant_type password
grant_type=password&username=admin&password=notARealSecret

# === OAuth2 Authorization Code Callback ===
# expect: OAuth2 Authorization Code Callback
https://app.example.com/callback?code=notARealAuthorizationCode01234567&state=xyz789

# === OAuth2 Device Code ===
# expect: OAuth2 Device Code
device_code=notARealDeviceCode0123456789abcdef0123456789

# === SAML Response (POST binding) ===
# expect: SAML Response (POST binding)
SAMLResponse=PHNhbWxwOlJlc3BvbnNlIHhtbG5zOnNhbWxwExampleNotARealSamlResponseAAAA

# === SAML Request (POST binding) ===
# expect: SAML Request (POST binding)
SAMLRequest=PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+ExampleNotARealSamlRequestPayloadAAAA

# === JWT alg none ===
# expect: JWT alg none
eyJhbGciOiJub25lIiwidHlwIjoiSldUIn0.eyJzdWIiOiIxMjM0NTY3ODkwIn0.

# === Session Cookie Header ===
# expect: Session Cookie Header
Cookie: sessionid=notARealSessionCookieValue0123456789abcdef

# === JWE compact (5-segment) ===
# expect: JWE Token
eyJaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa.bbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbbb.cccccccccccccccc.dddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddddd.eeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeee

# === Block 3e framework session cookies + OAuth/JOSE + headers ===
# expect: Framework Session Cookie
# expect: Flask Signed Session Cookie
# expect: ASP.NET Core Auth Cookie
# expect: Cognito Refresh Token Cookie
# expect: ASP.NET ViewState
# expect: PKCE code_verifier
# expect: OAuth PAR request_uri
# expect: OAuth CIBA auth_req_id
# expect: OAuth Token Exchange Token
# expect: OIDC id_token_hint
# expect: DPoP Proof JWT
# expect: GitLab PRIVATE-TOKEN Header
# expect: Azure Functions Key Header
# expect: API Key Auth Header
# expect: Negotiate/NTLM Authorization Header
sessionid=AbCdEf0123456789AbCdEf0123456789xyz
session=eyJ1c2VyIjoxfQ.ZAbcDe.aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ012345
.AspNetCore.Identity.Application=CfDJ8abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789
CognitoIdentityServiceProvider.1abc2def3.userpool.refreshToken=eyJjdHkiOiabcdefghij
__VIEWSTATE=/wEPDwUKMTYxNjI4OTYzMmRkabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789==
&code_verifier=dBjftJeZ4CVP-mB92K27uhbUJU1p1r_wW1gFWFOEjXk
request_uri=urn:ietf:params:oauth:request_uri:6esc_11ABCDEF
?auth_req_id=1c266114-a1be-4252-8ad1-04986c5b9ac1xyz
&subject_token=eyJhbGciaccesstokenvalue1234567890abc
?id_token_hint=eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9
DPoP eyJ0eXAiOiJkcG9wK2p3dCabcdefghijklmnop1234567890
PRIVATE-TOKEN: glpat-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx_abc
x-functions-key: aBcDeF0123456789aBcDeF0123456789aBcDeF==
X-Api-Key: 0123456789abcdef0123456789abcdef
Authorization: NTLM TlRMTVNTUAABAAAAB4IIaaaaaaaaaaaa
